allow:
Bash(cd wechat-carpool-miniprogram/src/static/images && python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image

# 创建 81x81 的图标
size = \(81, 81\)

# 普通状态 - 灰色 #999999
gray = \(153, 153, 153\)
# 选中状态 - 绿色 #07C160
green = \(7, 193, 96\)

icons = ['home', 'publish', 'chat', 'profile']

for icon in icons:
    # 普通状态
    img = Image.new\('RGB', size, gray\)
    img.save\(f'{icon}.png'\)
    
    # 选中状态
    img_active = Image.new\('RGB', size, green\)
    img_active.save\(f'{icon}-active.png'\)

print\('图标创建成功！'\)
EOF)

from PIL import Image

# 创建 81x81 的图标
size = \(81, 81\)

# 普通状态 - 灰色 #999999
gray = \(153, 153, 153\)
# 选中状态 - 绿色 #07C160
green = \(7, 193, 96\)

icons = ['home', 'publish', 'chat', 'profile']

for icon in icons:
    # 普通状态
    img = Image.new\('RGB', size, gray\)
    img.save\(f'{icon}.png'\)
    
    # 选中状态
    img_active = Image.new\('RGB', size, green\)
    img_active.save\(f'{icon}-active.png'\)

print\('图标创建成功！'\)
EOF)
